title: Xbox Bombed On Black Friday, And Was Outsold By A Kinect-Like Kids Toy #reviewtechusa
text:
A Middle-Aged Man Suffers Through Pokémon™ Legends: Z-A Livestream: 
https://youtube.com/live/IBrEA9jYAAw

Check out my newest ASMR Video (My Christmas Memories: From The Sega CD To Sony MiniDisc):

Join this channel to get access to perks:
   / @reviewtechusartu  

Yes, during the 2025 Black Friday week in the U.S., the little-known Nex Playground (an Android-based, motion-controlled console) actually outsold the Xbox Series X|S, placing third behind the dominant PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2 in console sales, highlighting a major shift in consumer interest towards affordable, family-focused interactive entertainment over traditional high-spec gaming. 

Key Details:
The Surprise Winner: The Nex Playground captured significant market share (around 14%), pushing Xbox out of the top three for the first time in years, according to Circana and TweakTown.

Consumer Trend: Shoppers prioritized accessible, active, and family-friendly fun (like the Nex's motion controls) over powerful specs, signaling a change in holiday buying habits.

Xbox's Struggles: This performance added to a tough period for Xbox hardware, with reports indicating it struggled to compete with the PS5 and Switch.

UK Market: The trend was similar in the UK, where Xbox was also a distant third behind the PlayStation 5 and Switch 2, though the Nex Playground wasn't available there.

title: Nex Playground Setup: Part 2 - On Screen Walkthrough
text:
This is Part 2 of your Nex Playground setup guide — the full walkthrough that helps you pair your remote, connect to Wi-Fi, create your Nex account, and finish on-screen setup. Need Part 1 first?    • New Nex Playground? Start Here! Part 1 - U...  

Let's go! 
1. Follow on-screen instructions to complete setup for Playground on your TV.
2. Press and hold the two yellow buttons together to connect the remote to Playground.
3. When pairing is successful, you should see the LED light blinking on the remote
4. Select your preferred language.
5. Connecting Playground to Wi-Fi is required for system updates and game downloads
6. Enter your Wi-Fi password using the remote.
7. Click "Connect" to confirm. Your Playground will now run any necessary updates.
8. Important - to avoid any lag during gameplay, watch till the end of this video for instructions about "Game Mode".
9. Scroll all the way down to continue.
10. Click "I agree".
11. Use your phone's Camera App to scan the QR code.
12. Tap the yellow link.
13. Select a method to sign up for a Nex account.
14. Enter your email address and take note of what you have provided.
15. Check the email you just entered for this temporary login key.
16. Tap "OK" to continue.
17. Activating Play Pass is an optional step, you can close this page and add it any time later.
18. Almost done! Follow the rest of the on-screen instructions to complete the setup.
19. Place Playground in the right spot. Centered, directly under your TV is the best spot.
20. Let's wake up Playground.
Tips: 
• Avoid clothes with patterns, long sleeves, or colors that match your walls.
• Avoid non-players in the camera view
• Clear your area of furniture (and pets!)
• Make sure the room is well lit, but avoid backlight

21. Ready? Let's give it a try. Remove the camera cover and snap it on the back of Playground.
22. Press the middle button on the remote to continue.
23. Ok, that's it. Let's play! 

Heads up! Playground needs time to download all system updates and games. It all happens automatically in the background. It takes around an hour on a fast internet connection. You can play any of the Starter Pack games for now.

title: Nex Playground Playdate Concept at CES 2026
text:
Many parents have told us that online games feel unsafe.
Some of you don’t even want Nex to attempt an online feature. That concern is valid.
But I do want to solve one very specific problem: How can my daughter play tennis with my mom when they’re separated by the Pacific Ocean?

After reading all your feedback on my last proposal, here’s our updated approach. 

How Playdate works (at a high level): 
• Parents set it up. Two devices can only connect through the parental app. No invites ever appear on the Playground. It’s fully opt-in by both parents, just like a real playdate. 
• Easy after connected. Once connected, both devices go into Tennis → Playdate → create or join a game. Parents coordinate separately by text or call. 
• No video or chat. During gameplay, only the minimum data needed to play is shared (like position and swing timing). No video, voice, or text communication. 

Status & next steps 
• We’ve built a prototype and shown it at CES (video below). We want early feedback and will keep sharing updates as we learn. 
• Playdate is on our 2026 roadmap. We won't release it until it meets our standards for safety and parental control. We won’t rush it. 
• We’ll ensure full KidSAFE+ and COPPA compliance, with third-party review. 

We build Nex Playground to deliver movement, connection, growth, and joy to families—without compromising safety, privacy, or security. Please share your questions, concerns, or feedback. We’re listening, and we’ll keep making it better. 💙

title: How to Reduce Video Game Lag on Nex Playground — Enable Game Mode
text:
IMPORTANT: Turning on "Game Mode" on your TV reduces gameplay lag and improves responsiveness, especially for fast-paced games .

1. Go to “Settings” then “Picture settings” 
2. Select the HDMI input Playground is using 
3. Bring up the Settings menu, and go to “Picture settings” then “Customize picture”
4. Scroll down to find “Game mode” 
5. Select “On” 
Done! 🎉 Your TV is now optimized to play video games without lagging

title: How to Pair a 3rd-Party Remote with Nex Playground (Easy Setup Guide)
text:
Need to use a 3rd-party remote to control your Nex Playground? This quick guide shows you how to pair a remote.

Amazon Remote that works with Playground: https://nex.fun/amazon-remote

Step-by-step instructions (you must follow this sequence):
1. Unplug everything: the HDMI cable from your TV, the HDMI cable from your Nex Playground, and both power cords (TV + Playground).

2. Keep all cables unplugged for 30 seconds.

3. Reconnect the HDMI cable securely to both the TV and Nex Playground

4. Plug both devices back into power.

5. Turn on your TV. Make sure the LED light on Playground is on, if not, ensure the power cable is all the way in, and your LED light turns on. 

6. Go to your TV settings and enable CEC (may appear as Control Other Devices, or HDMI-CEC)

7. Start pairing your remote:
 • Using your TV remote - return to your TV’s home screen. Select the HDMI input where Playground is connected. Not sure? Try one by one.
 • Using the 3rd-party remote, press the buttons around the circular pad.
• When pairing is successful, the remote light will blink blue, and a notification on your Playground screen should say “New Remote Paired.”

Great work — you’re ready to play! 🎉Want more quick Nex Playground tips?

title: How Nex Playground Became the #2 Game Console in the US by Ignoring Graphics
text:
Click here for current pricing of Nex Playground: https://amzn.to/4je27xu

The gaming console war just got flipped upside down.

A $199 cube-shaped console called Nex Playground has quietly become the #2 best-selling game console in the United States, even outselling the PS5 during Black Friday in unit sales.

So how did it happen?

Instead of chasing ultra-realistic graphics, Nex Playground focused on fun, active, family-friendly gameplay. No expensive controllers. No complicated setup. Just a camera that tracks up to four players at once.

Nex CEO David Lee explains why choosing PS3-level graphics was actually the secret weapon—and how avoiding high hardware costs made Nex Playground one of the most affordable and accessible consoles on the market.

In an era where gaming keeps getting more expensive, Nex Playground proves that fun still beats fidelity.

title: How to Turn Off Play Pass Auto-Renew on Nex Playground
text:
Need to turn off Play Pass auto-renew on your Nex Playground? Follow this simple walkthrough to update your subscription.

How to turn off Play Pass auto-renew:
1. Make sure Playground is connected to Wi-Fi and have your phone ready
2. Scroll up to “Settings” at the top of Playground’s home screen
3. Go to “Play Pass”
4. To manage your Play Pass, scan the QR code with your phone
Tip: Go to “System” - “Account” in Playground to check your account email if you forget*
5. Make sure to use the Camera App on your phone to scan the QR code
6. Tap the yellow link below the QR code
7. Select your log in method
8. Enter your email address and tap “Next”
9. Check your email for the temporary login key
10. Tap Manage on your Play Pass to view your subscription details.
11. You can view details of your current Play Pass here
12. To continue, tap “Turn off auto-renew”
13. You will see the expire date of your Play Pass here.
14. IMPORTANT! This action can’t be undone! If you are sure, tap “Turn off auto-renew” to proceed
15. Tap “OK” to confirm
16. Your Play Pass auto-renewal is now turned off, you may return to Playground

Want more quick Nex Playground tips?

title: How to Change Language on Nex Playground
text:
Stuck on a language you don’t know? Don’t worry, we've got you! Follow these step-by-step instructions to change the language on your Playground: 

1. Use the remote to change Playground’s language.
2. Go to the top menu, and click the third icon (System).
3. Go to the third option (Language) on this screen.
4. Select the desired language.
5. Click the down and then the middle button on the remote to confirm. You have successfully changed Playground’s language!
6. Click the home button on the remote to go back to the homepage. Your Playground is now ready to play in your chosen language.

channelName: GBR - Giochi per Bambini e Ragazzi
text:
Abbiamo provato la nuova console pensata per famiglia ma anche per feste con amici, parenti, adulti, ragazzi... insomma per chi vuole giocare e divertirsi in compagnia.

La console si chiama Nex Playground, al momento è acquistabile solo online perché disponibile all'estero e noi l'abbiam presa da qui https://playground.nex.inc/

Il bello di questa console è il suo essere controllata da... nessun controller o joystick. O meglio, c'è un mini telecomando per le operazioni base, ma poi si gioca con l'aiuto di una telecamera che ti inquadra e ti mostra sullo schermo e che, grazie all'intelligenza artificiale, ti fa interagire con il videogioco.

I videogiochi si trovano solo online, ce n'è quattro scaricabili al via, altrimenti c'è un pass periodico che si può attivare per sbloccare tutti i giochi disponibili. I titoli sono già tanti, raggruppati in grandi classici: si va dal party game con mini giochi, agli arcade sportivi, alla ginnastica e ballo in casa e poi i personaggi famosi, come Peppa o la versione videogioco del mitico Mangia Ippo.

Con Matilde e Nicolò ci siamo divertiti un mondo: questa console ti porta la sala giochi in salotto, ti fa muovere ed è sicura. Massimo rispetto della privacy, nessun acquisto strano fattibile, giocabilità a vari livelli. Perfetta.

Questa Nex Playground è una bella idea e il suo nome che vuol dire Parco Giochi è super azzeccato, sperando arrivi anche nel nostro paese.

#console #videogiochi #giochi

Iscriviti al canale GBR per non perdere i prossimi giochi in video https://www.youtube.com/user/giochibambini?sub_confirmation=1
translatedText:
We tried out the new console designed for families but also for parties with friends, relatives, adults, kids... basically, for anyone who wants to play and have fun with friends.

The console is called Nex Playground. Currently, it's only available online because it's only available abroad, and we got it here: https://playground.nex.inc/

The beauty of this console is that it's controlled by... no controller or joystick. Or rather, there's a mini remote control for basic operations, but then you play with the help of a camera that frames you and displays you on the screen, and which, thanks to artificial intelligence, lets you interact with the video game.

The video games are only available online; there are four downloadable ones at launch, or there's a periodic pass that can be activated to unlock all the available games. There are already many titles, grouped into classics: from party games with minigames, to sports arcades, to gymnastics and home dancing, and then famous characters, like Peppa Pig or the video game version of the legendary Eat Hippo.

Matilde and Nicolò had a blast: this console brings the arcade to your living room, gets you moving, and is safe. Maximum privacy, no weird purchases, and multi-level playability. Perfect.

This Nex Playground is a great idea, and its name, meaning "Amusement Park," is super fitting. I hope it arrives in our country too.

#console #videogames #games

Title: A New Twist on Brain Teasers: A 5-Minute Look at "Mingle" on NEX Playground (Sponsored)

The puzzle game genre has been a staple of gaming for decades, but how do you innovate on a classic formula? The team at NEX has a fascinating answer with their new game "Mingle" on the NEX Playground, and they were kind enough to sponsor a video so we could show it off.
